hero.headline: Concrete That *Stands the Test of Time*
hero.subheadline: Every pour, every finish, every detail — done right the first time.

services.title: Driveways & Sidewalks
services.description: Poured and finished to handle Huntington weather year after year. Proper slope, reinforcement, and curing.

services.title: Decorative Concrete
services.description: Stamped patterns, exposed aggregate, and colored concrete. Custom finishes that make your property stand out.

services.title: Repair & Restoration
services.description: Crack repair, resurfacing, and concrete restoration. We fix what time and weather have damaged.

services.title: Pool Decks
services.description: Non-slip surfaces and proper drainage around pools. Safe, attractive finishes built for wet conditions.

about.heading: Built Right, Built to Last
about.body: We're a Huntington concrete team that takes pride in every pour. When you call, you get real people who show up when promised.

reviews.name: Shane L.
reviews.text: Very helpful with questions about sealer around my pool. Would definitely recommend them.

reviews.name: Jon B.
reviews.text: Amazing company to deal with. Went over the top to help me out and did a great job!

reviews.name: Kevin P.
reviews.text: This is a good place and great business.

cta.heading: Ready to Start Your Concrete Project?
cta.body: Free estimates on all concrete work. Call today and let's discuss what you need.
